description:
Name: Shar Pitur

Proficiency: Vehicles

Birth: Detritus

Age: Classified

Affiliation(s): Frauleins
title: Fraulein Der Krieg
unit_description: A Fraulein vehicle mechanic who often volunteers as an Armored Element Operator. She is usually reserved and apologetic on the job, but once she feels she is inside an armored casket that she can drive, she feels invincible and often pushes the machine to its limit. Additionally, any vehicle she is assigned to go into battle to, she always modifies them to be nearly indestructible, thus making her a good asset to frontline vehicles with.
